name: Shane Gillis
blurb: Throwback club energy for the podcast era.
bio: Shane Gillis brings throwback club energy to the podcast era, an unbothered everyman riffing on family, history, and his own missteps. Fired from SNL before he started, he built a massive independent audience and hosted the show years later.

timeline.ev: Hired and fired by SNL in a week

accolades: Built an indie audience after the SNL firing
Gilly and Keeves viral sketch channel
